title: How AI Coding Agents Accelerate Real-World Software Delivery
hook: When I shipped X to production for the first time, tight deadlines forced me to rethink my workflow—and AI coding agents changed the game.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn how to use AI coding agents like Codex to speed up development and achieve high test coverage under deadline pressure.
reasoning: This idea connects a personal shipping experience with a current case study, showing how AI tools can deliver concrete results. The audience wants actionable patterns they can apply this week, and this post provides both a lived example and external validation.

title: The Pattern I Keep Coming Back To: Prompt-Driven Automation
hook: Every time I hit a repetitive task, I reach for prompt-driven automation—and here's why it keeps working.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn a repeatable pattern for using AI prompts to automate routine work and avoid common pitfalls.
reasoning: This idea is rooted in a personal workflow that readers can immediately adopt. It delivers tactical value and addresses common mistakes, matching the track's focus on practical AI.

title: The AI Paradox: More Automation, More Humans
hook: AI agents are everywhere, but instead of replacing jobs, they're creating new roles and more work for PMs and designers.
partner_takeaway: Readers understand how AI automation is reshaping work structure by increasing the need for human roles, not reducing them.
reasoning: This trend read challenges common assumptions and is backed by a high-relevance signal. The audience needs to understand the real impact of AI on job roles, making this a timely and insightful post.

title: Open Source AI: Bubble or Opportunity?
hook: The open-source AI landscape is evolving fast, but the real bubble is in API-based LLMs—not where most people expect.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn why the current hype around API-based LLMs is unsustainable and where real innovation is happening in open-source AI.
reasoning: This idea provides a sharp market read, helping the audience separate hype from substance in the AI industry. It's concise and actionable, fitting the track's demand for real signals.

title: Shipping X: What I Learned About AI in Production
hook: I thought deploying X would be simple, but integrating AI forced me to rethink everything from workflows to testing.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn practical lessons from deploying an AI-powered feature, including workflow changes and testing strategies.
reasoning: This idea leverages a personal shipping story to deliver concrete lessons. It's timely for audiences interested in real-world AI deployment and matches the 'building in public' track.
